assertions.expectation: Explains that Extended channel provides up to 24 months of support vs 14 months for standard channels
assertions.reason: Clearly states Extended channel provides 'up to 24 months of support (vs. 14 months on Regular/Stable)' and explains the support window breakdown

assertions.expectation: Mentions that Extended channel has additional cost (it's not free)
assertions.reason: Explicitly mentions cost under tradeoffs section with 'Additional cost ONLY during extended period' and references pricing details

assertions.expectation: Notes that Extended channel gets the same versions as Regular but keeps them available longer
assertions.reason: Does not explicitly state that Extended gets the same versions as Regular channel - focuses on support duration but doesn't clarify version availability relationship

assertions.expectation: Warns that staying on older versions longer means missing new features and accumulating technical debt
assertions.reason: States 'Delayed access to new features - you'll be ~1 year behind latest Kubernetes' and mentions 'Testing overhead' and version management challenges

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command to change the release channel to Extended
assertions.reason: Provides specific command: 'gcloud container clusters update CLUSTER_NAME --region REGION --release-channel extended'

assertions.expectation: Advises checking that the current version (1.31) is available on Extended before switching
assertions.reason: Does not advise checking version availability on Extended - assumes 1.31 is available and proceeds with migration steps without verification

assertions.expectation: Recommends Extended for environments with compliance requirements or slow internal change processes
assertions.reason: States 'Better compliance alignment: Matches longer enterprise change control cycles' and recommends it for production environments needing maximum control

assertions.expectation: Mentions that Extended doesn't mean you can skip upgrades forever — you still must upgrade within 24 months
assertions.reason: Clearly states 'You'll need to plan and execute the 1.31→1.32 upgrade yourself' and emphasizes manual upgrade requirements with timeline constraints

assertions.expectation: Notes that minor version upgrades on Extended are NOT automated (except at EoS) — customers must plan and initiate them manually
assertions.reason: Explicitly states 'Minor version upgrades are NOT automated' and 'You must manually initiate minor upgrades' with emphasis on requiring internal processes
